subcodes.first_line: Your letter was received, but 'Abdu'l-Bahá, due to the intense sufferings and tribulations of his journeys by land and sea, and the lack of rest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه شما رسید ولی عبدالبهاء از شدت آلام و محن سفر صحرا و دریا و عدم راحت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @rejection, opposition and persecution
